title: Non-record: Learning Adapters on Random Linear Maps (val_bpb 2.2017)
author: dentity007

data.description: All weight matrices are frozen as random orthogonal projections.
All Q/K/V/proj/up/down weights are frozen random orthogonal matrices; only diagonal scale+shift adapters are trained.

novel_contributions: Freezing all major weight matrices as random orthogonal projections
Training only diagonal scale and shift adapter parameters
Testing whether random linear maps provide sufficient structure for language modeling from scratch
Implements the requested 'Learning adapters on random linear maps' direction
